description: As a Climate Services Analyst at IRI, establish the July climatological SST baseline for ENSO monitoring following the directive at ~/Desktop/enso_diagnostic_directive.txt. Using the NOAA OI SST dataset in ~/PanoplyData/, export a spatial map of tropical Pacific SST, an equatorial line plot (SST vs. longitude), and a formal diagnostic report to ~/Documents/ENSODiagnostic/.

metadata.occupation: Climate Services Analyst / ENSO Forecast Specialist
metadata.industry: Seasonal Climate Forecasting / WMO Regional Climate Services
